description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly white and gray coloration, interspersed with dark greenish-black streaks and brown speckles. The surface is rough and uneven, featuring a mix of jagged and rounded contours, with some areas appearing more weathered than others. The stone's texture is gritty, with visible mineral inclusions and mottling that suggest a natural origin, possibly granite or a similar igneous rock. One side is flatter and more heavily marked by dark streaks, while the opposite side is lighter and more speckled. The stone appears solid and dense, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications. Its overall appearance suggests it has been exposed to the elements, contributing to its rugged and natural look.
description: A rough, irregular stone with white, gray, and dark greenish streaks, featuring a gritty, weathered surface and mottled mineral patterns.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's sloped, speckled side with a mix of white and brown spots and a prominent dark streak running diagonally.
description_view_1: The broadest face is visible here, dominated by gray and greenish-black streaks with a rough, uneven texture and less speckling.
description_view_2: This angle shows a more vertical, jagged edge with pronounced dark veining and a transition from speckled to streaked surfaces.
description_view_3: The lightest and most speckled side is shown, with a dense pattern of brown spots on a mostly white background and minimal dark streaks.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or embedded partially in the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled and speckled with irregular brown spots, dark greenish streaks, and subtle veining; the pattern is natural and non-repetitive.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with visible mineral inclusions and some surface pitting, indicating prolonged exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, grass, or gravel, often used as a decorative or functional barrier in landscaped urban environments.
